message:
feat(console): add event timestamps, kind filter, and detail enhancements

- Add ts_iso field to ConsoleEvent (ISO-8601 timestamp per event)
- Add filter_kind cycle (ToolCallStart → ToolCallEnd → HttpRequest → None)
- Enhance timeline detail pane with timestamp display
- Wire 'k' key for kind filter cycling in timeline view

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
